repo_prior_art.cite: eid_dml_orth_uniform/v1: banked common-EIF population variance collapse

published_prior_art.cite: Newey1994Econometrica + ChernozhukovEtAl2018ECTJ: same influence function and consistent studentization give common first-order limit

repo_prior_art.cite: closest is eid_dml_orth_uniform/v1, but v1 was downgraded for common-EIF population variance collapse and did not supply exact report-level summands

published_prior_art.cite: ChernozhukovEtAl2018ECTJ, ChernozhukovEscancianoIchimuraNeweyRobins2022LRO, ChernozhukovNeweySingh2022ADML: individual DML/LRO/ADML inference frameworks, no three-report iff spectral boundary

repo_prior_art.cite: eid_dml_orth_uniform/v1: finite-support/projection witness ideas existed, but exact report-certificate audit was not banked

published_prior_art.cite: BrunsSmith2026RieszApproaches: closest Riesz-equivalence comparator, but not an ATE-specialized LRO-vs-ADML report-classification theorem

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 1
soundness_flags.one_line: Assumption ass:lro-separated contradicts the normal-equation definition of c_{L,A,n}: c_{L,A,n} is already the Omega_n-projection of c_AD,n onto C_{L,A,n}, so the fixed 'non-equivalent' LRO premise is impossible as written.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 2
soundness_flags.one_line: The proposed iff condition c_{L,A,n}=Pi_C^Omega c_AD,n is tautological under Assumption ass:reports, making the claimed outside-equivalence branch empty.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 1
soundness_flags.one_line: The fixed published LRO normalization A_n^{pub}, L_{A^{pub},n} is not pinned to a concrete formula from the LRO paper; the proposal defines a class but the flagship frontier needs one exact report rule.

soundness_flags.label: Theorem 1
soundness_flags.one_line: The theorem promises explicit finite-support Gamma matrices but gives Gamma entries only as derivative definitions, so the audit certificate is not yet the concrete matrix reduction claimed.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Replace the LRO-separation condition with the non-tautological condition c_AD,n notin C_{L,A,n}, or equivalently c_{L,A,n} != c_AD,n, and rewrite Conjecture 2 around equality of report coefficients rather than equality to a projection.
Specify A_n^{pub} and L_{A^{pub},n} as an actual ATE specialization of the LRO sandwich formula, with a citation to the exact moment/Jacobian convention being specialized.
For Theorem 1, include at least the two-cell or J-cell closed-form entries for Gamma_DML,LRO and Gamma_LRO,ADML after differentiating the stated summands, not only the derivative operator definition.

Add BrunsSmith2026RieszApproaches to the drafter handoff checklist for Conjecture 2 because it is the closest recent published/preprint comparator on direct Riesz-estimator equivalence and non-equivalence.

recommended_next_step: Patch the coefficient-space contradiction first; without that, the flagship frontier is vacuous even though the published-axis novelty target is plausible.
